required_tools.reason: All projects require GitHub integration for PR creation, task scaffolds, and PR surfacing in the frontend. Used in tasks: 1 (secrets), 2 (issue creation), 4 (frontend PR surfacing), 7 (PR generation), 8 (E2E test), 9 (prod hardening), 10 (RBAC/secret rotation).

Kubernetes/Helm is the primary stack for infra provisioning, production hardening, RBAC, and secret rotation. Required for all infra tasks and for managing secrets, ConfigMaps, and deployments. Used in tasks: 1 (dev infra), 9 (prod hardening), 10 (RBAC, secret rotation, audit logging).
Linear API is used for issue creation, agent delegation, and notifications. Required for tasks: 1 (secrets), 2 (issue creation with delegation), 6 (Linear-Discord bridge), 8 (E2E test).
Discord webhook integration is required for pipeline start/complete notifications and Linear-Discord bridge. Used in tasks: 1 (secrets), 5 (notifications), 6 (issue notifications), 8 (E2E test).
Hermes/Nous research API is used for deliberation path research memo enrichment. Used in tasks: 1 (secrets), 3 (Hermes research integration), 8 (E2E test).

recommended_tools.reason: ArgoCD is referenced in the infrastructure context and is useful for GitOps deployment management, but not strictly required for the described tasks. If cluster GitOps automation is desired, this tool is recommended.
